title: The Box Of Horrors [FORGE]
description: The Box of Horrors is a mod that adds multiple iconic horror characters to your minecraft survival world, making it your personal hell
body:
![Description](https://i.imgur.com/tp50PuG.png)

[![wiki](https://i.imgur.com/jqILF3U.png 'wiki')](https://discord.gg/5e8EnwPZUt)
[![discord](https://i.imgur.com/UMUU8kG.png 'discord')](https://discord.com/invite/qp4pw2T)
